designs.name: Pull to Pop
designs.conditioned_path: pull-to-refresh lever
designs.mechanic: Drag the feed down like a pull-to-refresh, then release at the exact elastic snap. Too early = limp reload; too late = the bubble bursts and you lose. Each clean pop spawns a bigger reward bubble.

designs.name: Story Streak
designs.conditioned_path: swipe-up stories
designs.mechanic: Swipe up through a deck of story cards; hit the hidden 'next story' rhythm without skipping the mark. The tempo accelerates and the gap shrinks. Miss once and the streak burns like a 24h story.

designs.name: Like Blink
designs.conditioned_path: double-tap like
designs.mechanic: Hearts drift across the canvas; double-tap them before they fade. The heart you missed stays ghosted for a beat, clawing at the FOMO of a lost like.

designs.name: FYP Roulette
designs.conditioned_path: FYP unpredictability
designs.mechanic: A vertical feed of colored tiles flies by. Swipe up to skip, swipe down to save. One random tile is the 'jackpot clip'. The faster the feed, the more the variable reward anticipation screams.

designs.name: Pinch to Fit
designs.conditioned_path: pinch/zoom
designs.mechanic: A target shape pulses in the center. Pinch to shrink it, spread to grow it, then release when it perfectly frames the ghost outline. The outline flashes for one frame like a thirst trap you almost caught.

designs.name: Long Press Loot
designs.conditioned_path: long-press
designs.mechanic: Hold your thumb on a glowing chest. A bar fills from green to red. Release inside the narrow gold zone to bank the loot; hold too long and the chest explodes. Each round the zone shrinks.

designs.name: Autoplay Chicken
designs.conditioned_path: autoplay next
designs.mechanic: A countdown bar sweeps across the bottom like the next-video autoplay timer. Tap to stop it as close to zero as possible without letting the next 'video' start. The screen jitters as if it is about to load.

designs.name: Loop Trap
designs.conditioned_path: seamless video loops
designs.mechanic: A short animation repeats. A single frame is slightly different each loop. Tap when you spot the glitch before the loop resets. The seamless loop lulls System 2; the glitch hijacks novelty.

designs.name: Badge Bomb
designs.conditioned_path: red badge compulsion
designs.mechanic: Red notification dots swarm the screen. Tap them in order before they multiply. Tapping the wrong dot spawns three more. The brain cannot ignore a badge; here, clearing it is the game.

designs.name: Duet Trace
designs.conditioned_path: duet/remix
designs.mechanic: A ghost hand traces a shape; your thumb must mirror it in real time. The closer the overlap, the higher the 'duet score'. It feels like TikTok stitch muscle memory turned competitive.

designs.name: Filter Shift
designs.conditioned_path: filter face-transform
designs.mechanic: A face-like mask morphs through filters. Tap when the filter matches the target prompt (e.g. 'old', 'neon', 'cartoon'). The mask only holds the target for a split second before it slides to the next trend.

designs.name: Infinite Fall
designs.conditioned_path: infinite scroll
designs.mechanic: A tile falls endlessly through a feed of gaps. Swipe left/right to steer it through the open slots. Speed rises the deeper you go, turning the scroll habit into a vertical survival reflex.

designs.name: Seen Receipt
designs.conditioned_path: seen-receipt anticipation
designs.mechanic: A message bubble pulses; a tiny 'seen' check fades in and out. Tap exactly as the second check appears. Early = desperate; late = ignored. The anxiety of waiting becomes the input cue.

designs.name: Live Count Climb
designs.conditioned_path: live viewer count
designs.mechanic: A number ticks up and down like a live viewer count. Tap the screen to 'go live' when the count hits a target. The count jitters unpredictably, turning social proof into a twitch-aim game.

designs.name: Streak Flame
designs.conditioned_path: streak anxiety
designs.mechanic: A flame burns at the center. Swipe up to feed it once per beat. Miss a beat and the flame shrinks; three misses and it dies. The streak is visible, growing, and fragile.

designs.name: DM Typing
designs.conditioned_path: typing indicator anticipation
designs.mechanic: A three-dot typing indicator bobs. Tap when the dots stop and the message 'sends'. The pause length is random; the compulsion is the same held breath you feel in a chat window.

designs.name: Comment Race
designs.conditioned_path: comment-section speed
designs.mechanic: Comments fly upward like a live comment section. Tap the ones that match a hidden keyword before they scroll past. The faster the thread, the more the speed-reading brain locks in.

designs.name: Save Scroll
designs.conditioned_path: save/bookmark compulsion
designs.mechanic: Precious items flicker past in a feed. Swipe right to save, left to skip. The catch: you have only three save slots and the best items appear when your slots are full, forcing a painful curation choice.

designs.name: Profile Grid Match
designs.conditioned_path: profile grid browsing
designs.mechanic: A 3x3 grid of colored tiles flashes like a profile page. Tap the tile that changed. As rounds speed up, the grid gains 'posts' that distract from the changed one.

designs.name: Reply Window
designs.conditioned_path: reply-before-it-disappears
designs.mechanic: A story ring shrinks like an ephemeral reply timer. Type the shown phrase before the ring closes. Each correct reply extends the timer by a hair; each typo burns time.

designs.name: Soft Refresh
designs.conditioned_path: pull-to-refresh lever
designs.mechanic: Pull the screen down slowly. The further you pull, the slower your breath is guided. Release inside the calm zone to plant a seed. No score; the feedback is a garden tile that appears once per day.

designs.name: Endless Pond
designs.conditioned_path: infinite scroll
designs.mechanic: Scroll a pond surface downward. Lotus pads drift by; catch a petal by tapping, but the pond never ends and never scores. Each petal brightens the water for a moment, then fades. The scroll habit becomes a slow contemplation.

designs.name: Double Tap Breath
designs.conditioned_path: double-tap like
designs.mechanic: A heart gently expands and contracts. Double-tap on the exact exhale beat to sound a soft chime. The heart animation hijacks the like reflex and redirects it into paced breathing.

designs.name: Loop Rest
designs.conditioned_path: seamless video loops
designs.mechanic: A slow loop of nature shapes repeats. The instruction is to watch one full loop, then close your eyes for the next. The loop is the cue; the closed-eye pause is the game. No input required.

designs.name: No Badge
designs.conditioned_path: red badge compulsion
designs.mechanic: Red dots appear. You do not tap them. They fade on their own if left alone. Each un-tapped badge dissolves into a soft ripple. The point is to unlearn the swipe-to-clear reflex.

designs.name: Ratio King
designs.conditioned_path: ratio dynamics (replies vs likes on a post)
designs.mechanic: A post's like-counter and reply-counter both climb automatically; tap the reply counter to pump replies and flip replies > likes to 'win the ratio' before likes outpace you.

designs.name: Follower Flood
designs.conditioned_path: 'X started following you' notification flood
designs.mechanic: Follow notifications stream up from the bottom; tap each to accept before it scrolls off-screen — every missed accept costs your follower total, which climbs toward a milestone.

designs.name: Seen Wait
designs.conditioned_path: seen-receipt anticipation in DMs
designs.mechanic: Tap to send a DM, then watch the typing dots; the instant the 'seen' stamp flashes, tap to claim it — but tap BEFORE it appears and you've double-texted and lost the round.

designs.name: View Spike
designs.conditioned_path: live viewer counter flicker
designs.mechanic: Your stream's viewer counter jitters up and down in real time; tap BOOST only on a rising tick to bank viewers — tap on a falling tick and they leave. Catch the wave or watch it crash.

designs.name: Comment Dogpile
designs.conditioned_path: heart-liking incoming comments
designs.mechanic: Comments scroll up the post; tap each comment's heart before it scrolls off — every missed heart turns the crowd against you and speeds the scroll up.

designs.name: Duet Chain
designs.conditioned_path: duet/stitch remix chain
designs.mechanic: A beat plays under a looping clip; tap on each beat to attach your frame to the public remix chain — one mistimed tap and the chain snaps.

designs.name: Verified Chase
designs.conditioned_path: verified blue-badge aspiration
designs.mechanic: A checklist of criteria (profile pic, bio, posts, follower threshold) appears; tap each requirement into place in the right order before the review window closes to earn the blue check.

designs.name: Leaderboard Climb
designs.conditioned_path: leaderboard rank envy
designs.mechanic: A ranked list scrolls past; tap your row to climb past each name above you, but every tap costs more energy and rivals re-pass you the moment you hesitate.

designs.name: Story Viewers
designs.conditioned_path: story viewer-list checking (did they watch?)
designs.mechanic: After you post, viewer names stream into the viewer list; a target handle is hinted at the top — tap ONLY when your target appears in the flood. Wrong tap and they slip away.

designs.name: Trend Hijack
designs.conditioned_path: trending-hashtag riding
designs.mechanic: A hashtag's reach curve rises and falls; tap to jump on as it climbs, tap to jump off at the peak — stay on past the peak and your reach craters.

designs.name: Boost Button
designs.conditioned_path: boost / promote-post button
designs.mechanic: Tap the BOOST button to pump reach into a post — each tap adds viewers but fills a shadowban meter; tap BANK to lock in reach before the meter trips and wipes everything.

designs.name: Shadowban Roulette
designs.conditioned_path: 'your video is being reviewed' / shadowban anxiety
designs.mechanic: Posts sit in a 'reviewing…' state; tap CHECK to reveal status — but every check lowers your trust score. Check too often and the post goes shadowbanned forever.

designs.name: Add Yours
designs.conditioned_path: 'Add Yours' sticker prompt chain
designs.mechanic: A prompt sticker names a theme; thumbnail frames scroll past fast — tap the frame that matches the theme to append it to the public chain. Wrong frame and the chain breaks.

designs.name: Mention Dodge
designs.conditioned_path: @-mention / tagging in spreading threads
designs.mechanic: Your @handle gets flung into the conversation from both sides; tap to block each incoming mention before it sticks to your name — one that lands and the dogpile begins.

designs.name: Viral Wave
designs.conditioned_path: going-viral view-count spike
designs.mechanic: View count spins up fast; tap RIDE to multiply while it rises — the instant it peaks, STOP. One tap past the peak and the post crashes back to zero.

designs.name: Badge Clear
designs.conditioned_path: red notification badge clearing
designs.mechanic: Notification badges stack up; tap to clear each one — but every clear spawns 1-3 new badges at random. Keep the badge at zero as long as you can.

designs.name: Pinned Top
designs.conditioned_path: pinned top-comment status
designs.mechanic: Comments rise and sink in a live thread; tap to pin the one climbing hardest to the top before it falls — a successful pin earns the top-comment crown and points.

designs.name: Repost Train
designs.conditioned_path: repost / share forwarding chain
designs.mechanic: A post rolls along a track of friend stations; tap each station to repost it forward — the chain counter grows, but miss a station and the train halts.

designs.name: Poll Slider
designs.conditioned_path: story emoji-slider poll
designs.mechanic: A slider sweeps 0-100% while a poll's target % drifts; tap to lock the slider exactly on the moving target to win the vote — overshoot or undershoot and you lose.

designs.name: Suggested Dismiss
designs.conditioned_path: 'Suggested for you' / People you may know
designs.mechanic: Suggested profile cards slide in; tap to dismiss each one you DON'T know — but some are people you actually know and must keep. Wrong dismiss and you've burned a real contact.

designs.name: Unfollow Cleanse
designs.conditioned_path: follower-count accumulation anxiety
designs.mechanic: A follower list drifts down; tap gently to unfollow each account and watch your follower count fall — the relief is the count going DOWN. Breath-paced, no timer.

designs.name: Story Peace
designs.conditioned_path: story viewer-list compulsive checking
designs.mechanic: A full-screen story plays with NO viewer list and NO count — just the content fading gently frame to frame. The whole game is watching without checking who saw it.

designs.name: Badge Sit
designs.conditioned_path: red notification badge compulsion
designs.mechanic: Notification badges appear one by one — and you do NOTHING. Let them sit; each fades away on its own. Your score is how many you let dissolve without tapping.

designs.name: Slow Likes
designs.conditioned_path: like-count refresh compulsive checking
designs.mechanic: Likes arrive on your post one at a time, slowly, with no action required — just watch the heart fill and the number tick. The discipline is to observe without refreshing.

designs.name: Quiet Feed
designs.conditioned_path: visible like/view count comparison
designs.mechanic: A feed scrolls where every like and view count is blurred to '???' and only resolves if you linger. The game is to scroll PAST each post before the numbers resolve — letting the comparison stay unseen.

designs.name: Badge Panic
designs.conditioned_path: red badge compulsion
designs.mechanic: A number ticks up in the corner like unread notifications. Tap to clear it, but only when the badge turns solid red. Tap a phantom shimmer and you lose a life. The compulsion to clear is the trap.

designs.name: FYP Pull
designs.conditioned_path: pull-to-refresh lever
designs.mechanic: Pull down to load a new card. Each swipe either drops points, a dud, or a bomb. Stop after three duds or cash out. The lever becomes a slot machine you control with one thumb.

designs.name: Typing Standoff
designs.conditioned_path: 'typing…' indicator anticipation
designs.mechanic: A typing bubble pulses in the chat window. Tap the instant the dots vanish and a message appears. Tap early and you look desperate; tap late and the conversation dies. Each round the pause grows longer.

designs.name: Streak Tightrope
designs.conditioned_path: streak anxiety
designs.mechanic: Your streak number climbs automatically toward midnight. Tap once to 'send' and bank it, but the clock randomly speeds up or stalls. Miss the window and the number burns to zero.

designs.name: Story Expire
designs.conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO
designs.mechanic: A ring timer shrinks like a story circle. Tap when the remaining arc hits a hidden target zone before it disappears. Each level hides the target sooner and speeds the decay.

designs.name: Live Count
designs.conditioned_path: live viewer count
designs.mechanic: A viewer-count number flickers under your stream. Hold to keep going; release to cash out followers. Sudden viewer drops force a split-second decision: hold for the comeback or bail before zero.

designs.name: Autoplay Stop
designs.conditioned_path: autoplay next
designs.mechanic: Clips autoplay back-to-back. Tap exactly in the black gap between videos to 'pause' and score. The gap shrinks and fake transitions flash; stopping on a transition ends your streak.

designs.name: Lip Sync Duel
designs.conditioned_path: duet/remix
designs.mechanic: Lyrics scroll across a split screen. Tap when the active word crosses your marker to 'duet' perfectly. Decoy words flash early to bait a bad tap; each round scrolls faster.

designs.name: Face Morph Lock
designs.conditioned_path: filter face-transform
designs.mechanic: A face mesh morphs through filters. Tap when it lands on the target look for a split second. Morphs speed up and add decoy matches that look almost right.

designs.name: Doom Refresh
designs.conditioned_path: refresh roulette
designs.mechanic: Pull down to refresh. The spinner pauses at random. Release exactly when it lands on green. Release on red and you 'lose connection.' Each refresh adds a fake hang that tests your nerve.

designs.name: Request Purgatory
designs.conditioned_path: DM request/unread indicator
designs.mechanic: Message-request bubbles float up the screen. Swipe right to accept, left to decline. Accept spam and you lose a life; decline a real one and you lose two. The icons grow more identical as you climb.

designs.name: Save Later Guilt
designs.conditioned_path: saved/liked-later collections
designs.mechanic: Posts fly by. Swipe right to save, left to skip. Saved posts pile at the bottom; if the stack reaches the top, you drown. The real win is learning to stop saving.

designs.name: Comment Cliff
designs.conditioned_path: 'more replies' truncation
designs.mechanic: A comment thread unrolls line by line. Tap to expand the next line before it collapses. Each level hides lines faster and plants fake 'read more' traps that steal your time.

designs.name: Poll Fever
designs.conditioned_path: poll/vote anticipation
designs.mechanic: Two poll bars race toward 50%. Tap when your chosen bar crosses the line. The bars jitter, stall, and reverse; the result stays uncertain until the final frame.

designs.name: Going Live
designs.conditioned_path: live countdown / going live
designs.mechanic: A 'LIVE' badge pulses. Tap to start exactly when the ring completes. Start early and you get zero viewers; start late and you miss the trend window. The countdown is irregular.

designs.name: Online Dot
designs.conditioned_path: 'someone is online' green dot
designs.mechanic: Green dots appear and fade across a grid of profiles. Tap only the dot that stays solid for a full second. Fake dots flicker to exploit the green-dot impulse.

designs.name: Like Check
designs.conditioned_path: engagement check impulse
designs.mechanic: Your post sits center-screen and the heart count flickers. Tap only when it actually rises; never tap on a hold or a fake surge. Each round adds more phantom jumps.

designs.name: Link in Bio
designs.conditioned_path: 'link in bio' friction
designs.mechanic: A bio link loads with a progress bar. Tap exactly when it hits 100% before the page 'redirects' to a fake ad. The bar stutters, backtracks, and pauses to punish rushing.

designs.name: Unsent Draft
designs.conditioned_path: draft anxiety / posting hesitation
designs.mechanic: A 'Post' button hovers. Hold it down while a second counter fills. Release early and the draft vanishes; release late and it auto-posts cringe. The fill pauses unpredictably.

designs.name: Badge Sunset
designs.conditioned_path: red badge compulsion
designs.mechanic: Red badges drift in from the edges. Don't tap them. They fade on their own if you wait. Each badge that dissolves by patience blooms into a soft particle and clears the corner.

designs.name: FYP Breath
designs.conditioned_path: FYP unpredictability
designs.mechanic: Cards drift by slowly. You do not swipe. After each card the screen holds a breath-prompt circle until it fades. The reward is the space between, not the next card.

designs.name: Streak Release
designs.conditioned_path: streak anxiety
designs.mechanic: A streak number gently counts down day by day. You do nothing. When it reaches zero it turns into a seed and plants a small garden mark. Letting go is the only action.

designs.name: Seen Peace
designs.conditioned_path: seen-receipt anticipation
designs.mechanic: Messages send without status labels. The screen shows only a slow ripple; you wait until it fades. The loop teaches that 'delivered' does not need a reply.

designs.name: Story Archive
designs.conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO
designs.mechanic: A story ring appears and completes without disappearing. Tap once to stamp it as a soft memory. The ring stays on screen and slowly forms a calm collage. Nothing expires.

designs.name: FILTER GLOW
designs.conditioned_path: filter face-transform (IG/TikTok beauty filters that smooth, enlarge, and glow-up the face)
designs.mechanic: A face sits in frame; every tap stacks another random filter layer (smooth, saturate, enlarge eyes, jaw-sharpen). Keep tapping to pile on vanity transforms until the face glitches and 'breaks' — the score is how many layers you stacked before it shatters.
designs.video_trick: vanity arms-race (invented) — push the filter to absurdity, the break is the punchline

designs.name: GRID CURATE
designs.conditioned_path: aesthetic-grid curation (the IG profile 3x3 grid people agonize over for color harmony)
designs.mechanic: A 3x3 profile grid fills with random photo tiles; tap any two to swap them. A live harmony meter reads the color balance of the grid — chase the highest harmony % you can before you lock it.

designs.name: DRAFT COURAGE
designs.conditioned_path: posting anxiety + the drafts folder (the hover-before-post hesitation)
designs.mechanic: A 'Post' button glows; press and hold to build courage — a meter rises. Release inside the green zone to actually post and bank it; release too early or too late and it dumps to Drafts and you score nothing. Each round the green zone shrinks.

designs.name: STORY CATCH
designs.conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO (the story bar of decaying rings you scramble to watch before they expire)
designs.mechanic: A row of story bubbles drifts in, each with a 24h ring depleting around it. Tap each ring at peak brightness (full ring) to 'catch' it; tap too late and it expires and breaks your combo. Speed ramps as rings appear faster.
designs.video_trick: FOMO catch (invented) — the ring is draining, catch it before it's gone

designs.name: DUET SYNC
designs.conditioned_path: duet/remix (the TikTok split-screen duet where you answer the other half on beat)
designs.mechanic: The left half of the screen plays a beat pattern; the right half is yours. Tap your half to lay your hits so they land exactly in the gaps of the left beat. A sync meter scores how tightly your half locks into theirs.

designs.name: DOUBLE-TAP RUSH
designs.conditioned_path: double-tap like (the IG muscle-memory double-tap that fires a heart animation)
designs.mechanic: A feed scrolls upward; photo cards stream past and you double-tap each one to drop a heart on it. The double-tap is the whole verb — clean doubles score, sloppy single-taps miss. Hearts pile up as a visible like-count you're racing to grow.

designs.name: SAVE OR LOSE
designs.conditioned_path: saved/bookmark posts (the IG ribbon for save-for-later, hoarded against a felt scarcity)
designs.mechanic: Cards drift down a feed; tap the bookmark ribbon on the ones worth saving — but your Saves slot has limited capacity. Fill it and a card you wanted slips past unsaved. The compulsion is choosing what's worth keeping under a hard cap.

designs.name: POLL PREDICT
designs.conditioned_path: story sticker poll (the two-option poll you vote on to see which side wins)
designs.mechanic: A story poll appears with two options and a live results bar creeping toward the majority. Tap your pick before the timer ends; you score only if you predicted the winning side. Streak builds across consecutive correct predictions.

designs.name: ACTIVE DOT
designs.conditioned_path: seen-receipt / active-now green dot (the anticipation of catching someone online)
designs.mechanic: A DM-style contact list scrolls; most dots are grey, but one flickers green for a brief window. Tap the green dot in its window to 'catch them online' — miss it and they go back to grey. The green windows get shorter and rarer.

designs.name: FYP TRAIN
designs.conditioned_path: FYP 'not interested' training (the long-press-to-dismiss feed-shaping god-complex)
designs.mechanic: Thumbnails stream in labeled with topic tags; long-press to mark 'not interested' and tap to keep. Your feed purity score rises as you weed out the off-topic ones — but misjudge and you nuke a good topic. Race to the cleanest FYP in 60s.
designs.video_trick: algorithm god-complex (invented) — you are the algorithm, shape the feed

designs.name: LIKE GUESS
designs.conditioned_path: like-count hiding (the IG 'hidden likes' curiosity that makes you want to know the number)
designs.mechanic: A post appears with its like-count blurred out; a slider lets you guess the number, then the blur clears. Score by how close your guess lands — within 1% is a perfect. Streak across posts; the counts get weirder each round.

designs.name: REPOST CHAIN
designs.conditioned_path: repost/regram (the chain-posted meme that lives only if someone keeps reposting it)
designs.mechanic: A post travels along a conveyor; tap the repost button the instant it crosses the trigger line to pass it forward. Each clean repost extends the chain; a mistimed tap breaks it and the chain dies. The conveyor speeds up as the chain grows.

designs.name: TAG EVERYONE
designs.conditioned_path: tagging people in photos (the IG compulsion to tag every face before the post feels complete)
designs.mechanic: A group photo shows faces as glowing target dots; tap each face to tag it before the upload timer runs out. Missed faces are 'untagged' and the post stays incomplete — tag them all for a clean upload, the count of faces grows each round.

designs.name: FILTER RESTORE
designs.conditioned_path: filter face-transform (the same beauty-filter conditioning, inverted toward the real face)
designs.mechanic: A face starts buried under stacked filters (smooth, saturated, enlarged). Tap gently to peel one filter layer at a time, breathing back toward the unedited face. When the natural face is fully restored, the screen softly settles and the session ends.

designs.name: GRID BREATHE
designs.conditioned_path: aesthetic-grid curation (the same grid-conditioning, freed from judgment)
designs.mechanic: A 3x3 grid of soft color tiles; tap any two to swap them at your own pace. No meter scores you — when the grid feels balanced to you, it gently locks and pulses once with your breath, then rests. Curation without a verdict.

designs.name: DRAFTS RELEASE
designs.conditioned_path: posting anxiety + the drafts folder (the hoard of unposted thoughts, inverted to letting go)
designs.mechanic: A stack of 'draft' cards (half-written thoughts) sits on screen; swipe each one gently upward and it dissolves with a soft exhale. No posting, no saving — just releasing the pressure to say it. The session ends when the drafts are clear.

designs.name: STORY SET
designs.conditioned_path: stories 24h FOMO (the same story-ring conditioning, without the scramble)
designs.mechanic: A row of story bubbles with depleting rings sits on screen; you don't race them. Each ring empties on its own and the bubble fades with a soft chime; tap one only to acknowledge it before it goes. It's okay that they expire — you watch them settle and the bar empties.

designs.name: ARCHIVE WALK
designs.conditioned_path: memory/archive 'on this day' (the IG archive recap, without the recomputation anxiety)
designs.mechanic: A slow vertical scroll through your 'archive' — soft dated photo cards drift up one at a time. The scroll is pace-locked so you can't rush; each card lingers, then passes. The walk has a last card and a gentle close. Memory as a stroll, not a feed.

designs.name: BREATH FILTER
designs.conditioned_path: filter face-transform (the reach for a filter, replaced by the breath as the only 'adjustment')
designs.mechanic: Hold the screen to inhale — the color temperature warms and the image clarifies; release to exhale and it cools and softens. There is no face to fix; the 'filter' is your own breath cycling the screen. Pace it slowly; the session closes after several breaths.

designs.name: SAVE BOX
designs.conditioned_path: saved/bookmark posts (the save-for-later ribbon, without the storage scarcity)
designs.mechanic: Soft cards drift across the screen; tap a card to lift it gently into a keepsake box at the bottom. There is no capacity limit and no urgency — each save lands with a quiet chime. Keep what matters; the box fills at whatever pace you choose.

designs.name: POLL NO STAKES
designs.conditioned_path: story sticker poll (the two-option vote, without majority pressure or a wrong answer)
designs.mechanic: A gentle poll appears ('tea or coffee', 'morning or night'); tap either option and the bar softly reveals both sides — no winner, no score, just your pick noted. Each poll fades into the next at a slow, even pace. Opinion without competition.

designs.name: PROFILE SETTLE
designs.conditioned_path: profile picture / glow-up editing (the endless profile-polish, inverted to done)
designs.mechanic: An avatar sits with filter effects slowly spinning around it (polish, glow, sharpen). Hold still and the effects gradually calm and fall away, settling into one quiet resting portrait. When it's still, the session closes — you're done, you can stop editing.

designs.name: UNFOLLOW QUIET
designs.conditioned_path: following list / mute-unfollow (the curation of who fills your feed, toward less noise)
designs.mechanic: A grid of noisy tiles (loud colors, buzzing labels) fills the screen; tap a tile to gently unfollow it and it fades to calm. The screen audibly quiets as you remove noise — no score, just the relief of a calmer field. Stop whenever it feels quiet enough.

designs.name: MEMORY JAR
designs.conditioned_path: memory/archive feature (the 'save a memory' instinct, as gentle accumulation not recap anxiety)
designs.mechanic: Hold the screen and a glass jar slowly fills with soft glowing memory-motes rising from below; release and the motes settle gently to the bottom. Fill it at your own breath pace — there's no quota and the jar never overflows. Accumulation as rest.

designs.name: CAPTION REST
designs.conditioned_path: caption-writing anxiety (the blank caption field and the pressure to say it right)
designs.mechanic: A blank caption field with a softly blinking cursor; you don't type. Hold the screen and the 'right words' surface as a gentle fade — read them, then the post button stays disabled and the thought simply dissolves. The caption was enough; it never needed to publish.

designs.name: SPONSORED
designs.conditioned_path: trained ad-detection reflex (years of sponsored-post pattern recognition)
designs.mechanic: A fake feed scrolls by; one post per round is an ad, disguised progressively more natively. Tap it the instant you spot it — tapping an organic post ends the run. Rounds escalate from obvious #ad to influencer-native camouflage.
designs.video_trick: participation-comment-bait (freeze on round 7: can YOU spot it? pause now)

designs.name: RULE FLIP
designs.conditioned_path: FYP format-flipping — the feed that re-novelties itself by swapping layouts (text → photo → video → carousel) before you habituate
designs.mechanic: Tap the green tile, dodge the red — except every 4 seconds the rule inverts: now tap red, dodge green, then tap nothing, then tap both. The brain that craves novelty gets it from a rule that keeps flipping, not an endless feed. Survive 10 flips and it ENDS.
designs.video_trick: rule-inversion bait — 'wait, it just flipped again' keeps the hook clip re-watching

designs.name: MICRO MASH
designs.conditioned_path: TikTok trend-mashup feeds — rapid-cut comps of 15 different trends stitched into one 30s clip
designs.mechanic: A fixed deck of 15 micro-games, each 3 seconds with a one-word instruction (TAP, HOLD, SWIPE, DODGE, LIFT, CATCH). Clear one, the next flashes up instantly — a fresh novelty hit every 3s. The deck has a bottom card: clear all 15 and it prints FIN. Variety shuffle with a real ending.
designs.video_trick: WarioWare-style rapid-cut — each 3s clip is a different mini-hit, the pace is the hook

designs.name: VERB BLINK
designs.conditioned_path: the one-tap verb UI of Stories/Reels — tap, hold, swipe-up mapped to a dozen actions
designs.mechanic: A single verb flashes center-screen for 2 seconds then swaps: TAP, HOLD, SWIPE UP, DON'T MOVE, DOUBLE-TAP. Execute the verb on the target before it changes; one wrong move ends it. The novelty is the rule churning faster than you can settle into it — then it stops.
designs.video_trick: anticipation agony — 'what's the next word gonna be' keeps eyes locked

designs.name: GENRE SHUFFLE
designs.conditioned_path: the FYP genre-whiplash — cooking clip, then prank, then dance, then ASMR, back to back
designs.mechanic: Every 10 seconds the game swaps genre entirely: catch falling dots → dodge rising bars → tap the lit tile → trace the line. One thumb, four genres in 40s, then FIN. The format-flip IS the novelty — the same way the FYP hits you with a different genre each swipe, except here it ends.
designs.video_trick: genre-whiplash — 'wait this is a totally different game now' is the rewatch trigger

designs.name: COLOR FLIP
designs.conditioned_path: thumbnail churn — trending color palettes that re-novlety the whole feed at once
designs.mechanic: The whole screen cycles through colors; a target color flashes for 1 second — tap the instant the background matches it. The target color changes each round and the cycle speeds up. 12 quick-win bursts, then a clean stop. The novelty hit is a fresh target every beat.
designs.video_trick: near-perfection itch — the almost-match you mistimed haunts the rewatch

designs.name: SWITCH STANCE
designs.conditioned_path: control-scheme shifts mid-scroll — swipe gestures that invert between apps without warning
designs.mechanic: One endless runner track; every 6 seconds the control scheme flips: left/right invert, tap-to-jump becomes tap-to-duck, swipe-up becomes swipe-down. Adapt to the new stance or crash. The novelty is your own muscle memory betraying you — and a crash ends it.
designs.video_trick: shock-honesty — 'I just died because the controls flipped' is the share line

designs.name: ODD RULE
designs.conditioned_path: spot-the-difference / 'which one doesn't belong' trend clips
designs.mechanic: Spot the odd tile in a grid — but the definition of 'odd' changes each round: odd color, then odd shape, then odd count, then odd rotation. You re-discover the rule every 5s, exactly the pattern-hunt the FYP feeds. 15 rounds, then done.
designs.video_trick: play-along comment bait — 'can you spot it before round 8?'

designs.name: TEMPO FLIP
designs.conditioned_path: trending-audio swap — the same dance clip re-cut to a faster/slower sound every post
designs.mechanic: Tap a pulsing dot on the beat; every 8 beats the required tempo flips — double-time, then half-time, then off-beat-only. Quick-win bursts of rhythm adaptation. The novelty is the tempo itself churning. Six tempos and it resolves.

designs.name: MASH DECK
designs.conditioned_path: the shuffled Discover feed — no two cards in a row are the same topic
designs.mechanic: A shuffled deck of 20 micro-tasks, each a different 3s verb-action (tap 3, hold 1s, swipe left, avoid red, catch 2). Tap to draw the next card; clear the whole deck to win. Each card is a fresh mini-hit and the deck has a bottom — the novelty hit, then a stop.
designs.video_trick: variable-reward roulette — you never know which card is next

designs.name: WIN FLIP
designs.conditioned_path: algorithm re-ranking — the thing that won yesterday flops today, the rules silently invert
designs.mechanic: A simple tap game, but the win condition inverts every 5 seconds: tap FAST to score, then tap SLOW to score, then DON'T tap to score, then tap only on green. The brain that craves novelty gets it from rule-flips instead of new content — and a wrong move ends it.
designs.video_trick: shock-honesty — 'the win condition literally flipped on me'

designs.name: QUICK QUEST
designs.conditioned_path: the 5-part 'wait for it' challenge reel — a stacked to-do list of micro-dares
designs.mechanic: A fixed quest log of 10 micro-missions, each 5 seconds and totally different: catch 3, avoid 2, hold 1s, swipe 4, trace the line. Check one off, the next appears. The quest log visibly completes — every open loop actually closes, then FIN.
designs.video_trick: completion-satisfaction — watch the quest log tick down to zero

designs.name: INPUT ROULETTE
designs.conditioned_path: app onboarding — every new screen demands a different gesture you've never seen
designs.mechanic: Each round flashes a random input icon (tap, long-press, swipe, double-tap, drag) for 2 seconds; do the right gesture before the window closes. The demanded verb is the novelty — re-learn the move each round. Streak builds until a wrong gesture ends it.
designs.video_trick: split-second judgment — 'tap or hold?!' panic is the clip

designs.name: MINI BOSS RUSH
designs.conditioned_path: viral 'final boss' trend chains — each clip escalates to a harder version of the last
designs.mechanic: Eight mini-bosses, each a distinct 10s micro-challenge: dodge a spiral, tap a shrinking zone, hold through static, steer a falling shard. Beat one and the next slams in. The novelty is a brand-new boss every 10s — and beating the 8th prints FIN.
designs.video_trick: competitive rank — 'I got to boss 7, beat that'

designs.name: SORT SHIFT
designs.conditioned_path: re-categorization churn — the algorithm silently re-tags your interests mid-session
designs.mechanic: Items fall into two lanes; swipe each to the right bin — but the sorting rule changes every 4 seconds: by color, then by shape, then by size, then by symbol. Quick re-categorization every few beats; one mis-sort ends it. The rule churns like a feed re-tagging itself.
designs.video_trick: near-perfection itch — the mis-sort at the rule-flip haunts you

designs.name: SPIN RULE
designs.conditioned_path: trend-roulette — the wheel-of-trends format where each spin lands on a fresh challenge
designs.mechanic: A spinner lands on a new rule every 4 seconds — TAP ALL, TAP NONE, TAP ONLY BLUE, TAP THE BIGGEST, AVOID RED. Execute the landed rule on the tiles before it spins again. The wheel is the novelty engine; 12 spins and the session closes.
designs.video_trick: variable-reward roulette — the spin itself is the cliffhanger

designs.name: RULE STACK
designs.conditioned_path: feature-creep feeds — each scroll adds a new UI rule on top of the last
designs.mechanic: Rules compound each round: round 1 'tap red', round 2 'tap red but not if it's big', round 3 'tap red small but only on the left'. Every round adds one rule to the stack — how deep can you hold the whole rule-set before you slip? The novelty is a thicker ruleset each beat.

designs.name: FLICK FLIP
designs.conditioned_path: trending-challenge flips — the same challenge re-posts with the rules subtly inverted
designs.mechanic: Flick tiles into the matching bin; every 5 seconds the bins silently swap labels — left was recycle, now left is trash. Quick adaptation to a rule that flips like a re-posted trend. One wrong bin ends it; the format-flip is the whole game.
designs.video_trick: shock-honesty — 'the bins just swapped on me' is the clip

designs.name: PATTERN BREAK
designs.conditioned_path: the 'what changed?' edit-bait clip — same clip, one frame altered, spot it
designs.mechanic: A pattern flashes, then repeats with one element changed — tap the changed element. But what counts as 'the pattern' rotates each round: color change, then position change, then size change. Re-orient your attention every 5s, exactly the orienting response the FYP farms. Ends at a miss.
designs.video_trick: play-along comment bait — 'did you catch round 9?'

designs.name: NOVELTY GARDEN
designs.conditioned_path: the novelty-craving itself — the brain that wants a fresh hit every few seconds, met without the spike
designs.mechanic: A daily deck of 10 tiny varied sensory micro-toys — pop one, ripple one, spin one, tap one — each a fresh little input, but slow and unhurried. Draw one card at your own pace; the deck has a last card, and finishing plants a small garden tile. Bounded variety with no spike, then it's done for the day.
designs.video_trick: the feed that ends — novelty that closes itself instead of scrolling forever

designs.name: SHUFFLE SETTLE
designs.conditioned_path: the shuffled-feed craving — the want for 'something different' untied from any urgency
designs.mechanic: A shuffled deck of gentle one-tap micro-prompts — tap a dot, hold a breath, swipe a petal, lift a leaf — each card a different tiny verb drawn at breath pace. The deck has a bottom card; the screen softly dims as it empties. Variety as a calm walk that genuinely ends.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — the variety itch scratched, then the lights go down

designs.name: Dimmer Switch
designs.conditioned_path: the 2am doomscroll where the screen is the only light left on in the room
designs.mechanic: Press and hold anywhere; the screen brightness decays the longer you hold, lifting toward black. Release and it creeps back up. The whole game is holding the dimmer down through one long exhale until the screen goes fully dark — that black frame is the end.
designs.video_trick: the feed that ends — the screen itself is the object being put down

designs.name: Counting Sheep
designs.conditioned_path: the autoplay loop you can't close, replaced by the oldest wind-down ritual
designs.mechanic: Sheep drift one at a time over a fence; tap each as it leaps to count it. Every counted sheep slows the next one's drift and darkens the sky a shade. After the last sheep the field is black and the session closes — a loop with a built-in finish line.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — the ritual that actually ends

designs.name: Feed Fadeout
designs.conditioned_path: the infinite autoplay feed engineered to outlast your willpower
designs.mechanic: A vertical feed auto-scrolls on its own — you do nothing. As it plays, the scroll tempo slows, the audio fades, and the frames dim. You watch the autoplay mechanism run out of fuel until it stalls on a black frame. The game is letting the feed die instead of feeding it.
designs.video_trick: the feed that ends — autoplay surrendered to stillness

designs.name: Tempo Tether
designs.conditioned_path: the rapid-cut hype edits that clock your resting heart rate up
designs.mechanic: A soft orb pulses on a beat; tap as it peaks. Each clean tap lengthens the interval to the next pulse and dims the screen a notch. You are literally slowing your own tempo — by the end the beat is once every few seconds and the screen is black.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — you slow the beat yourself

designs.name: Scroll to Still
designs.conditioned_path: the infinite-swipe thumb that keeps moving past every stopping point
designs.mechanic: Swipe up slowly; the feed moves but each swipe adds friction and dims the screen a shade. The more you scroll, the heavier it gets, until the feed won't move at all and settles into black. The scroll habit is braked to a full stop instead of rewarded for speed.
designs.video_trick: the feed that ends — friction as the off-ramp

designs.name: Breath Dim
designs.conditioned_path: late-night arousal held in the chest, with no pacing cue to bring it down
designs.mechanic: Hold to inhale (screen brightens a touch), release to exhale (screen dims). Each full breath lowers the brightness baseline a step, so the resting level itself decays toward black across the session. Your breath is the dimmer, and sleep-onset is the decaying baseline.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — biofeedback dimming to sleep

designs.name: Lights Out
designs.conditioned_path: the lit-room / blue-light exposure that keeps the brain reading 'daytime'
designs.mechanic: A grid of soft glowing lights fills the screen; tap each to switch it off. Every light extinguished dims the whole screen and lowers a background hum. Turn them all off and the room is dark — the last light off is the session end.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — darken the room one light at a time

designs.name: Last Tab
designs.conditioned_path: the 2am tab-hoarding rabbit hole — one more article, one more wiki
designs.mechanic: Browser-style tabs stack on screen; swipe each one gently upward to close it. Each closed tab dims the screen and quiets the ambient sound. Close them all and the browser is empty and black — the open-loop tab hoard resolved to zero.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — close every loop you opened

designs.name: Heartbeat Slow
designs.conditioned_path: the elevated heart rate the feed leaves you with at 2am
designs.mechanic: A heartbeat thumps on screen; tap in time with each beat. Every matched tap drops the heart rate a few bpm and dims the screen. The goal is to walk the beat all the way down to a resting sleep rate and a black screen — slowing the body, not the feed.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — bring the rate down yourself

designs.name: Snowfall Settle
designs.conditioned_path: the sensory loop that won't stop stimulating when you need stillness
designs.mechanic: Snowflakes drift down; tap each one to gently settle it to rest. Each settled flake stops moving, darkens the sky a shade, and quiets the wind. When every flake is at rest and the sky is black, the storm has passed and the session ends.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — settle the scene to still

designs.name: Volume Fade
designs.conditioned_path: autoplay audio — the sound that keeps the room from going quiet
designs.mechanic: A low tone plays; hold to slowly lower the volume and dim the screen together. Release early and both creep back up. Hold through to silence and black and the session closes. You fade the stimulus out instead of letting it autoplay into the night.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — fade the sound to nothing

designs.name: Long Yawn
designs.conditioned_path: the contagious-yawn reflex the body uses to signal sleep-onset
designs.mechanic: A yawn ripple begins; hold to stretch it out longer. Each held yawn dims the screen a notch and slows the next ripple. Three full yawns and the screen is black — hijacking the body's own sleep-contagion cue as the mechanic.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — the contagious yawn as the cue

designs.name: Clock Melt
designs.conditioned_path: the 2am bedside-clock-watching that makes time stretch instead of pass
designs.mechanic: A bedside clock face shows; hold to slow the minute hand. The longer you hold, the more the hand drags and the screen dims, stretching time toward stillness. When the hand stops and the face goes black, time has finally let go and the session ends.
designs.video_trick: shock-honesty — the clock you've been staring at, defused

designs.name: Pixel by Pixel
designs.conditioned_path: the lit screen as a field of wakefulness you can't switch off wholesale
designs.mechanic: The screen is a dense field of lit pixels; each tap extinguishes a small cluster. The screen progressively darkens as you clear clusters, the hum quieting with each. Turn off the last lit pixel and the screen is fully black — sleep as pixel-by-pixel surrender.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — darken the screen one tap at a time

designs.name: Dimming Window
designs.conditioned_path: blue-light / day-spectrum exposure that tells the brain it is still daytime
designs.mechanic: A window looks out on a sky; hold to advance the sun from day toward night. The sky darkens, the color temperature warms down, and ambient daytime sound fades to silence. When the sky reaches full night and black, the body has its cue and the session closes.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — run the sunset yourself

designs.name: Slow the Loop
designs.conditioned_path: seamless video loops that play forever with no exit cue
designs.mechanic: A short looping animation plays; tap once per loop to lengthen its period. Each tap stretches the loop longer and dims the screen, until the loop period is many seconds long and the screen is black. You break the seamless loop by making it too slow to hold you.
designs.video_trick: the feed that ends — the loop you slow until it stops

designs.name: Candle Out
designs.conditioned_path: the single light left on as a security against sleep
designs.mechanic: A candle flame flickers; hold to let it burn lower. Each held moment shrinks the flame, dims the screen, and lowers the soft crackle. When the flame gutters out the screen is black — the last light you kept on, finally allowed to go.
designs.video_trick: calm completion — let the last light go out

designs.name: One More Stop
designs.conditioned_path: the FYP 'one more video' autoplay lure that keeps you scrolling past every exit
designs.mechanic: Cards autoplay like a FYP, each tagged 'one more?'. The only move is to NOT swipe — every second you hold still, the screen dims a shade; one swipe and it brightens back. Score is how many seconds you hold the dimmer down to black. The win is resisting the swipe that the algorithm lives on.
designs.video_trick: loss aversion inverted — the score is how early you stop

designs.name: Racing Mind
designs.conditioned_path: the 2am thought-loop firing faster than you can settle it
designs.mechanic: Thought bubbles fire across the screen fast; tap each to set it down before it escapes. Every caught thought slows the fire rate and dims the screen, until the thoughts barely come and the screen is black. Score is thoughts set down — the racing mind caught and slowed to sleep.
designs.video_trick: completion-satisfaction — catch every thought, then they stop

designs.name: Autoplay Surrender
designs.conditioned_path: the autoplay countdown bar that dares you to let the next video load
designs.mechanic: A countdown bar sweeps toward the next 'video' like the autoplay timer. The move is to NOT tap stop — let each countdown run out, and each one dims the screen. Score is how many autoplays you surrender before the screen goes black. The discipline is letting the countdown win so you can lose the feed.
designs.video_trick: anticipation agony — endure the countdown instead of dodging it

designs.name: Dead Center
designs.conditioned_path: aim-lab / target-accuracy skill tutorials that make you itch to hit pixel-perfect
designs.mechanic: A reticle shrinks toward the bullseye; tap when it covers the exact center pixel. Your PB is the closest center-distance in pixels — lower is better, and the margin tightens each level.

designs.name: Frame Lock
designs.conditioned_path: 'wait for it' / perfectly-timed loop clips where one frame is the money shot
designs.mechanic: A short animation loops; one frame per cycle has a perfect alignment. Tap exactly on that frame. Miss-timing is shown in milliseconds from perfect so you chase the zero.

designs.name: Apex Tap
designs.conditioned_path: trick-shot / peak-moment compilations that train your eye to hit the apex
designs.mechanic: A ball bounces up and down; tap at the exact apex of each bounce. Bounces get faster and higher, shrinking the apex window until only frame-perfect taps keep the run alive.

designs.name: One Cut
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying perfect-cut / restock ASMR that sells the fantasy of one flawless motion
designs.mechanic: A colored bar extends across the screen; tap once to stop it exactly at the target length. Length error is your score — the PB is the lowest total error across ten cuts.

designs.name: Thread Needle
designs.conditioned_path: sewing / craft precision tutorials where the clean thread is the whole payoff
designs.mechanic: A tiny gap pulses open and shut; tap to send a thread through at the exact widest moment. Later levels add vibration that makes the window feel impossible.

designs.name: Perfect Pour
designs.conditioned_path: cooking / bartending 'perfect pour' clips that make you want to nail the line
designs.mechanic: Hold to pour liquid into a vessel; release exactly when the fill line is hit. Overpour or underpour ends the run. PB is the closest fill % to the target across attempts.

designs.name: Circle Judge
designs.conditioned_path: perfect-circle challenges / handwriting perfection clips where the flawless stroke gets the clout
designs.mechanic: Draw a circle in one thumb stroke. The game scores roundness, closure, and radius consistency as a single perfection %. PB is the highest %; 100 is the impossible ceiling.

designs.name: Split Equal
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying equal-split / portion-perfect content that rewards flawless division
designs.mechanic: A line travels across the screen; tap to divide it into equal segments. Each round demands more cuts, and the variance from equal is your score — lower is better.

designs.name: Tuning Match
designs.conditioned_path: audio / perfect-pitch ASMR rabbit holes that promise the satisfaction of true unison
designs.mechanic: Drag a pitch slider until two tones cancel into silence. Your distance from perfect unison is scored in cents. PB is the lowest cents — a race toward zero without time pressure.

designs.name: Metronome Lock
designs.conditioned_path: music / rhythm perfect-play covers where one missed beat breaks the flawless run
designs.mechanic: A metronome ticks; tap exactly on each beat. Drift is shown in milliseconds and the track ends after 32 bars, giving a clean PB time to chase on every replay.

designs.name: Zen Archer
designs.conditioned_path: archery / target-sport PB compilations that glorify the one perfect release
designs.mechanic: Hold to draw the bow, release at peak tension for a bullseye. Release too early or late and the arrow drifts. Wind adds micro-variance so mastery is measurable in millimeters.

designs.name: Drop Flat
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying landing / parkour perfect-landing clips where flat is the whole win
designs.mechanic: A block falls and spins; tap to lock its rotation so it lands perfectly flat. Angle error is your score — 0 degrees is the PB, and falls get faster each attempt.

designs.name: Snap Grid
designs.conditioned_path: organization / 'everything in its place' satisfying grid content
designs.mechanic: Drag a floating shape and release when it snaps perfectly into the grid. Snap distance is scored in pixels; later levels shrink the grid and add misaligned decoys.

designs.name: Wire Walk
designs.conditioned_path: steady-hand / 'don't touch the wire' challenge videos that turn precision into spectacle
designs.mechanic: A dot travels a winding wire; tap and hold to guide it along the exact center. Any deviation from the wire ends the run. PB is the farthest distance you kept centered.

designs.name: Stack Level
designs.conditioned_path: perfect-stacking / Jenga / building tutorials where one misaligned block ruins the tower
designs.mechanic: Blocks swing in from the sides; tap to drop each one flush on the stack. Misalignment accumulates until the tower topples. PB is the tallest perfectly aligned tower.

designs.name: One Stroke Maze
designs.conditioned_path: one-stroke drawing / 'perfect line' art challenges that reward a single clean motion
designs.mechanic: Trace a maze in one continuous thumb stroke without lifting. Scored on smoothness and time; the PB is a combined clean-run score that rewards grace over speed.

designs.name: Equal Arm
designs.conditioned_path: balance / physics-perfect setup videos where equilibrium is the satisfying end-state
designs.mechanic: Weights slide along a balance beam; tap to lock each weight so the arms balance exactly. Error is shown in grams, and the PB is the lowest total imbalance.

designs.name: Peak Hold
designs.conditioned_path: breath-hold / plank PB challenges where releasing at the right instant is everything
designs.mechanic: Hold your thumb down while a meter rises to a green target zone, then release at the exact peak. Early or late costs distance from perfect. PB is the closest peak release in %.

designs.name: Pixel Perfect
designs.conditioned_path: pixel art / perfect-block placement clips where one wrong pixel ruins the piece
designs.mechanic: Tap to place a pixel at exact coordinates on a grid. The grid zooms in and tolerance shrinks each level. PB is the highest level reached with zero misplaced pixels.

designs.name: Rubik Sequence
designs.conditioned_path: Rubik's solve / speedcubing PB clips that make you want a flawless memorized run
designs.mechanic: A sequence of colored faces flashes; repeat it with taps in the exact order. Each perfect recall adds one more move. PB is the longest flawless sequence you can chain.

designs.name: Dare Duel
designs.conditioned_path: direct-message / story dare challenges
designs.mechanic: Tap to send a dare-link to one friend; both of you get exactly one 60-second run. The higher score wins and the loser gets a 'settled' stamp. The dare closes after both play — no ladder, just the score.

designs.name: Percentile Chase
designs.conditioned_path: percentile-rank envy on analytics dashboards
designs.mechanic: One 90-second run. At the end the game shows your percentile against everyone who played today. Cross the 90th percentile and it generates a dare-link to challenge the next player above you.

designs.name: Head-to-Head Sprint
designs.conditioned_path: live comment-section speed battles
designs.mechanic: Two players open the same dare-link and race split-screen for 45 seconds on identical targets. The winner keeps a session-only crown sticker; the loser sees 'next time' and the session closes.

designs.name: Top Ten Today
designs.conditioned_path: daily leaderboard rank envy
designs.mechanic: Play once. If your score lands in today's top 10% you get a gold badge and a dare-link to challenge the player directly above you. The ranking resets tomorrow; nothing persists beyond the day.

designs.name: Clout Ladder
designs.conditioned_path: rank / clout climbing loops
designs.mechanic: A 10-rung ladder appears; each rung is a one-shot micro-challenge. Reach the top rung in one session, then dare a friend to knock you off in a single attempt. The ladder vanishes after the dare is settled.

designs.name: Follower Face-Off
designs.conditioned_path: follower-count milestone chasing
designs.mechanic: You and a friend each get 60 seconds to accept the right follower notifications and reject bots. First to the milestone wins; the dare-link encodes both scores and a single winner flag.

designs.name: Leaderboard Snap
designs.conditioned_path: leaderboard screenshot sharing
designs.mechanic: Play a 30-second round. The game renders a one-time leaderboard image with your score and three empty friend slots. Share it as a dare; friends beat it or not, then the snap expires and is no longer valid.

designs.name: Score Tag
designs.conditioned_path: @-mention challenges in comment sections
designs.mechanic: Finish a run, then tap a friend's handle to tag them in a dare-link. They get exactly one attempt to beat your score; after that the tag is settled and the link goes dead.

designs.name: Crown Match
designs.conditioned_path: pinned top-comment / top-donator crown status
designs.mechanic: A single head-to-head duel: tap rapidly to keep a crown in your half of the screen. After 30 seconds the crown holder wins and earns a session-only crown emoji to stamp the dare-link.

designs.name: Beat the Seed
designs.conditioned_path: replying to viral challenge posts
designs.mechanic: A dare-link plants a 'seed score' from the sender. You get one 60-second run to beat it. Win and you uproot the seed; lose and the seed stands. The seed travels with the link and dies after one reply.

designs.name: Rank Roulette
designs.conditioned_path: engagement-ratio gambling
designs.mechanic: You have one ranked bet per session: choose a shareable score, then tap to stop a spinning multiplier. Beat your bet and the dare-link upgrades; lose and the link shows the honest result with no retry.

designs.name: Dare Chain
designs.conditioned_path: repost / share-forward chains
designs.mechanic: A friend dares you; beat their score and the link auto-updates with your score so you dare the next friend. The chain stops after five links or when someone fails — the final score is the chain record.

designs.name: Percentile Poker
designs.conditioned_path: hidden like counts / guess-the-engagement
designs.mechanic: Play one round blind, then bet whether your score sits in the top 50%, 25%, or 10% of today's dares. Reveal, win the bet, and send the dare-link. Wrong bet ends the session with no share.

designs.name: Trophy Dash
designs.conditioned_path: achievement / trophy collecting
designs.mechanic: Race a friend through a 60-second obstacle course; trophies spawn on the path. Most trophies at the finish wins the dare. Both players see the identical course, so the better run takes it.

designs.name: Clout Check
designs.conditioned_path: verified-badge / clout verification
designs.mechanic: A friend's score appears as a blue-check dare. Tap to attempt the same 30-second challenge once. The game stamps 'verified' if you beat it, 'not verified' if you don't — one try, then the dare is settled.

designs.name: Speed Bracket
designs.conditioned_path: live tournament brackets / elimination streams
designs.mechanic: A dare-link starts a 4-player bracket. Each match is one 30-second thumb duel; winners advance, losers are out. The bracket resolves in under 3 minutes and the winner holds the bracket badge.

designs.name: Score Shield
designs.conditioned_path: defending a pinned top comment / rank
designs.mechanic: Set a score as your 'shield' and share the link. Challengers get one run to break it. If they fail, your shield stands; if they win, their score becomes the new shield and you get one notification, then it's done.

designs.name: Viral Dare
designs.conditioned_path: watching a post's view count explode
designs.mechanic: You post a dare; every friend who opens the link adds to a view counter. The goal is to make the dare 'go viral' among your friends within a single day, then the link dies — a bounded popularity contest.

designs.name: Rank or Tank
designs.conditioned_path: all-or-nothing algorithm gamble
designs.mechanic: One 60-second round, no retries. Your score maps to a single session rank badge — Bronze, Silver, or Gold. Share the badge as a dare; the receiver must also play one round and either outrank you or tank.

designs.name: Knockout Dare
designs.conditioned_path: elimination-style live battles
designs.mechanic: A dare-link sends one tough round. Both players get exactly one attempt. Higher score survives; lower score is knocked out. The dare auto-expires once both have played, so the result is final.

designs.name: BLINK CUT
designs.conditioned_path: rapid-cut jump-scare edits that train the finger to flinch
designs.mechanic: A strobe of cuts flashes on screen; tap the instant the "safe" color frame appears between jump-scare frames. Each round cuts faster and adds more decoy flashes.

designs.name: FRAME CATCH
designs.conditioned_path: rapid-cut transition edits that hide the one perfect frame
designs.mechanic: A montage cycles at high speed; tap when the target shape briefly matches the ghost outline. The cuts accelerate and the match window shrinks to a single frame.

designs.name: DROP DODGE
designs.conditioned_path: vertical falling-object videos that demand a side-step reaction
designs.mechanic: Objects drop from the top of the feed; tap left or right to dodge the falling hazards. Speed and density ramp up until the 60-second burst ends.

designs.name: SPIKE BLOCK
designs.conditioned_path: threat-rush edits where something flies at the camera
designs.mechanic: Spikes shoot in from the right edge; tap to raise your shield at the last instant. Too early and you tire; too late and the spike gets through.

designs.name: GATE SNAP
designs.conditioned_path: CapCut 'shape-match' transition trends that close around the subject
designs.mechanic: A shrinking gate closes around a silhouette; tap exactly when the gate matches the outline. The gate jitters and fake silhouettes flash to bait bad taps.

designs.name: COLOR POP
designs.conditioned_path: fast-paced 'find the odd one out' quiz videos
designs.mechanic: A swarm of colored dots pops on screen; tap the one target color before it vanishes. Decoy colors look almost identical and the swarm grows each round.

designs.name: F1 START
designs.conditioned_path: sports highlight countdowns and race-start hype edits
designs.mechanic: Five red lights count down; tap the instant they all go out. The delay between lights-out and green is random, punishing anticipation and rewarding pure reaction.

designs.name: LAST FRAME
designs.conditioned_path: 'wait for it' reveal clips where the payoff lasts one frame
designs.mechanic: A clip plays toward a final reveal; tap during the single valid frame before the video cuts to black. Fake-out endings appear to trick the eager thumb.

designs.name: FLASH LOCK
designs.conditioned_path: flash-warning / strobe edits that train the eye to lock on brightness
designs.mechanic: The screen strobes white; tap when the flash hits peak brightness. Dim decoy flashes flicker before the real one, forcing the player to wait for the true peak.

designs.name: ORB DODGE
designs.conditioned_path: ASMR/satisfying orb and ball-physics videos turned threat
designs.mechanic: A glowing orb rockets toward center screen; tap to sidestep left or right at the last moment. The orb telegraphs late and fake-outs spin the wrong direction.

designs.name: DEFLECT ZONE
designs.conditioned_path: deflection / 'catch and throw' reflex videos
designs.mechanic: A projectile enters from the top; tap when it crosses the glowing deflection zone to bat it back. The zone shrinks and the projectile speed rises each round.

designs.name: MARKER STOP
designs.conditioned_path: hype-edit progress bars and countdown sweepers
designs.mechanic: A marker sweeps back and forth across a track; tap to stop it inside the target zone. The sweep accelerates and the target zone narrows every level.

designs.name: TWITCH MATCH
designs.conditioned_path: fast Q&A and split-second comparison videos
designs.mechanic: Two shapes flash side by side; tap when they match, do nothing when they differ. Decoy near-matches appear faster and faster until the round ends.

designs.name: BEAT DODGE
designs.conditioned_path: beat-drop edits where obstacles slam on the drop
designs.mechanic: A beat line pulses at the bottom; tap to duck under barriers that slam down on every beat. The BPM climbs and off-beat traps force late reactions.

designs.name: CATCH CLAW
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying grab/catch and unboxing drop videos
designs.mechanic: Prizes fall from above; tap to extend the claw and catch each prize at the exact catch height. Catching too high or too low drops it, and the drop speed increases.

designs.name: RED DOT RUN
designs.conditioned_path: red notification dots that trigger an instant tap reflex
designs.mechanic: Red dots pop up randomly across the canvas; tap each before it disappears. Phantom grey dots flicker to bait false taps, and the spawn rate escalates.

designs.name: SCARE RELEASE
designs.conditioned_path: jump-scare videos that train the viewer to flinch
designs.mechanic: Hold your thumb down during a quiet buildup; release exactly when the jump scare triggers. Release early and you chicken out; release late and the scare already got you.

designs.name: SPLIT SORT
designs.conditioned_path: rapid-fire 'left or right' sorting and reaction-test videos
designs.mechanic: Shapes slide down the center; tap left or right to sort them into matching zones before they cross the deadline. The stream gets faster and shapes become more ambiguous.

designs.name: AIM SNAP
designs.conditioned_path: precision-tap mobile-game clips and speed-aim challenges
designs.mechanic: A crosshair drifts across targets; tap when it perfectly centers the active target. The drift speeds up and decoy targets pop to steal the aim.

designs.name: PULSE PARRY
designs.conditioned_path: parry-based combat edits and 'perfect dodge' gaming moments
designs.mechanic: An attack pulses toward you; tap on the exact beat to parry. Parry too early and you expose yourself; too late and you take the hit. Tempo escalates each round.

designs.name: Swipe Reveal
designs.conditioned_path: wait-for-it / satisfying reveal videos
designs.mechanic: Drag your thumb across a pixelated cover to uncover the hidden image underneath. Clear enough to guess correctly and the loop closes with the payoff; clear too much and the reveal is wasted.

designs.name: Mystery Box Stack
designs.conditioned_path: unboxing videos
designs.mechanic: Tap each box in a vertical stack to unwrap it; every box holds a clue tile that narrows the final item. Open the last box to solve the mystery and bank the set.

designs.name: Next Episode
designs.conditioned_path: binge "next episode" hooks
designs.mechanic: Swipe up through micro-chapters; each ends on a two-choice beat that unlocks the next scene. The final chapter resolves the arc and the session closes instead of cliffhanging forever.
designs.video_trick: cliffhanger chain with a real ending

designs.name: Pattern Vault
designs.conditioned_path: phone unlock pattern / lock-screen muscle memory
designs.mechanic: Trace the hidden pattern across a grid of dots. Each correct unlock slides open a new secret panel; the third panel opens the vault and reveals the treasure inside.

designs.name: Hidden Message
designs.conditioned_path: "read the caption to the end" / cryptic text posts
designs.mechanic: Tap scrambled letter tiles to flip them into the correct word order. The final sentence is the punchline; once it reads clean, the message is delivered and the loop closes.

designs.name: Map Uncover
designs.conditioned_path: where-is-this / travel reveal videos
designs.mechanic: Drag a flashlight across a dark map to reveal landmarks one by one. Find the hidden marked spot and the destination unlocks with a short payoff card.

designs.name: Number Riddle
designs.conditioned_path: only smart people solve this" puzzle posts
designs.mechanic: A sequence flashes; tap the missing number before the timer runs out. Solving N sequences reveals the hidden meta-pattern that ties them all together.

designs.name: Before After Wipe
designs.conditioned_path: before/after transformation wipe videos
designs.mechanic: Drag a slider across a split image to reveal the after. Land the wipe inside the target reveal zone and the transformation payoff flashes; miss and you only get a tease.

designs.name: Escape Tap
designs.conditioned_path: escape-room / puzzle-solving videos
designs.mechanic: Tap objects in a tiny room to find hidden clues. Each clue unlocks the next drawer; the key opens the door and the escape is complete.

designs.name: Plot Twist
designs.conditioned_path: plot twist storytime videos
designs.mechanic: Tap to choose the next story beat from two options. The third choice flips everything and reveals the twist ending; once it lands, the story is over.

designs.name: Layer Peel
designs.conditioned_path: what's inside / layer-cake reveal videos
designs.mechanic: Swipe to peel layers off a shape; each layer changes color and sound. Reach the center object and the final reveal plays with a satisfying bloom.

designs.name: Code Breaker
designs.conditioned_path: decode this audio/text" puzzle posts
designs.mechanic: Tap digits on a keypad to crack a short code. Each correct digit reveals one word of the hidden message; the final word resolves the whole clue.

designs.name: Shadow Guess
designs.conditioned_path: guess the object" shadow videos
designs.mechanic: A shadow slowly rotates; tap when you recognize the object before the full reveal. Faster correct guesses unlock harder silhouettes and end with a final master shape.

designs.name: Recipe Reveal
designs.conditioned_path: cooking / recipe reveal videos
designs.mechanic: Swipe ingredients into a bowl in the right order. The final swipe bakes the dish and reveals what you made; wrong order gives a comedic fail but still closes the loop.

designs.name: Maze Exit
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying maze solve videos
designs.mechanic: Drag one thumb through a maze from start to finish. Each correct turn reveals the next corridor; reaching the center shows the exit payoff and ends the run.
designs.video_trick: will it find the way out

designs.name: Question Flip
designs.conditioned_path: answer in the comments" flip-card posts
designs.mechanic: Tap cards to flip them; one hides the answer to the riddle at the top. Find the answer before you run out of flips and the card locks with the payoff.
designs.video_trick: the answer is behind one card

designs.name: Stack Spell
designs.conditioned_path: building to a reveal" process videos
designs.mechanic: Tap to stack blocks; each block adds a letter to a hidden word. The tower spells the answer that resolves the prompt at the top and the payoff lands.

designs.name: Zoom Find
designs.conditioned_path: zoom in on this" detail reveal posts
designs.mechanic: Pinch to zoom into a busy photo. Find the hidden target detail and the image resolves into a surprising caption; the loop closes when the detail is found.

designs.name: Quiet Reveal
designs.conditioned_path: satisfying reveal videos
designs.mechanic: Swipe to peel translucent layers off a soft shape. Each layer reveals a warmer tone until the center object rests fully exposed; no timer, just the closed loop of the completed image.

designs.name: Slow Scroll
designs.conditioned_path: read the caption to the end" posts
designs.mechanic: A short story advances one gentle tap at a time. The last line delivers the resolution, then the screen fades to close; the payoff lands and the session ends.

designs.name: SNAP TO GRID
designs.conditioned_path: oddly-satisfying restock and shelf-filling loops on TikTok
designs.mechanic: Scattered tiles float on a canvas; drag each one to its ghost outline until it snaps perfectly into place. Every clean snap fires a soft click and the tile locks with a glimmer, building a complete orderly grid from chaos.

designs.name: MIRROR LINE
designs.conditioned_path: symmetry-check and before/after cleaning videos
designs.mechanic: One half of the canvas shows a fixed pattern of shapes; drag shapes onto the blank half to mirror it perfectly. A symmetry meter ticks toward 100% as you match each element across the center axis.

designs.name: COLOR SORT JAR
designs.conditioned_path: color-matching and candy-sorting ASMR feeds
designs.mechanic: Mixed colored beads fill a jar; tap a bead to select it, then tap a target jar to transfer it. Sort every bead into its matching jar until each container holds only one color and the screen settles into stillness.

designs.name: POWER WASH TILE
designs.conditioned_path: pressure-washing and power-wash ASMR that never fully cleans the last corner
designs.mechanic: A dirty tiled floor fills the canvas; drag your thumb slowly across it to reveal the clean surface underneath. The percentage cleaned ticks upward in the corner; when it hits 100% the final reveal blooms and the session ends.

designs.name: SHELF RESTOCK
designs.conditioned_path: store-restock and grocery-facing ASMR that loops before the last row is done
designs.mechanic: An empty shelf grid sits center-screen; products drift in from the side and you tap each one to place it in the correct slot by color or size. When every slot is filled the shelf glows complete and the loop ends instead of resetting.

designs.name: ALIGN CENTER
designs.conditioned_path: slightly-off text and design layouts that bother you on every scroll
designs.mechanic: A block of text or an icon sits visibly off-center on a canvas; drag it millimeter by millimeter until the alignment guides snap and the element locks exactly in the middle. The tension dissolves audibly when center is found.

designs.name: FOLD PERFECT
designs.conditioned_path: laundry-folding and closet-organization ASMR that pauses on the messy drawer
designs.mechanic: A shirt shape sits on the canvas with fold-line guides; swipe along each guide in sequence to fold it into a tight square. Imprecise swipes leave a crease indicator; a clean fold earns a crisp snap and the shirt stacks perfectly.

designs.name: CLOSE THE LOOP
designs.conditioned_path: open-tab and notification-pile anxiety that the feed farms instead of resolving
designs.mechanic: Circles with small gaps drift across the canvas; drag the open end of each arc closed so the circle snaps shut with a soft ring tone. Each closed loop dims and sinks, and when all loops are closed the canvas goes quiet.

designs.name: TILE FILL
designs.conditioned_path: incomplete mosaic and pixel-fill ASMR where the last tile never arrives
designs.mechanic: A grid has a handful of empty cells; tap each empty cell to fill it with the matching color drawn from the surrounding pattern. When every cell is filled the mosaic pulses once in satisfaction and the game ends.

designs.name: STACK EXACT
designs.conditioned_path: block-stacking and book-stacking videos where the pile always wobbles
designs.mechanic: Blocks drop one at a time from above; tap at the precise moment each block aligns with the one below to stack it flush. A perfect stack accumulates without wobble; at ten blocks the tower glows and the session completes.

designs.name: LEVEL IT
designs.conditioned_path: slightly-tilted photo and crooked-shelf videos that halt before they're fixed
designs.mechanic: A framed picture or object sits at a slight angle on the wall; drag the rotation dial slowly until the bubble in the spirit-level indicator settles dead center. Hold it level for two seconds and it clicks into place and hangs straight.

designs.name: RESTORE ORDER
designs.conditioned_path: messy-desk and clutter-clearing ASMR that stops right before the last item is put away
designs.mechanic: A room scene has objects scattered out of place; tap each misplaced object and tap its correct spot to return it. As each item snaps home a calm ambient note plays; when the last object is placed the room settles into perfect stillness.

designs.name: SYMMETRY BUILD
designs.conditioned_path: mandala-drawing and geometric-pattern ASMR that loops before the shape closes
designs.mechanic: Tap on the left half of the canvas to place a shape; its mirror image appears on the right simultaneously. Build out a symmetric composition tile by tile until a full mandala blooms and the canvas fades to rest.

designs.name: SORT RUSH
designs.conditioned_path: sorting and categorizing ASMR that speeds up until items fall off the edge
designs.mechanic: Items with labels (color, shape, size) pour in from the top; swipe each one left or right into the correct bin before the lane clogs. Wrong sorts cost a second; a clean run chains into a speed multiplier. Dare-share your sort streak.

designs.name: SYM SNAP
designs.conditioned_path: spot-the-difference and symmetry-challenge clips where the answer is withheld
designs.mechanic: Two halves of a pattern appear; drag the movable piece until both halves are perfectly symmetrical. Your accuracy percentage is calculated to two decimal places and stamped as your shareable score — dare friends to beat your %.

designs.name: CLEAN SWEEP
designs.conditioned_path: speed-cleaning and clutter-blitz videos that end before every surface is wiped
designs.mechanic: A cluttered room grid shows dirty zones; swipe to clean each cell in the fastest possible order. Your completion time is recorded and displayed — dare a friend to clean the same room faster.

designs.name: GRID FILL
designs.conditioned_path: tetris-filling and inventory-management ASMR where one block always sticks out
